title: Episode
description: A single weekly Model Mondays livestream/podcast episode.

id.description: Slug identifier, matches the YAML filename without extension.

season.description: Season id this episode belongs to, references data/seasons/<id>.yaml.

status.description: 'placeholder' for not-yet-recorded future episodes, 'published' once video is live.

youtubeVideoId.description: YouTube video ID (11 chars), omitted for placeholder episodes.

youtubeUrl.description: Full YouTube watch URL, omitted for placeholder episodes.

segmentType.description: Segment format(s) featured in this episode.

speakers.description: Speaker ids appearing in this episode, references data/speakers/<id>.yaml.

tags.description: Tag ids for this episode, references data/tags/<id>.yaml.

metrics.description: Latest known engagement metrics snapshot (kept in sync via data/metrics/*.json + weekly-stats workflow).

transcriptPath.description: Relative path from repo root to the transcript markdown file, e.g. 'data/transcripts/<id>.md'.

chapters.description: Optional timestamped chapters parsed from the video description.

resources.description: Related Microsoft Learn or external documentation links.

summary.description: AI-generated episode summary organized by segment type.

provenance.description: How this record was sourced, e.g. 'scraped:youtube-playlist' or 'placeholder:season-schedule'.
